prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约5302→5561→5077→4513，呈波动中前移趋势；2025年改为新高考物理类后，因烟台研究院应用型专业（城乡规划、设施农业等）拉低 整体门槛，最低位次骤降至约9598名，校本部专业组最低仍维持在4510名。2025年基准位次约9598名；本省理科/物理类计划：2021年64人、2022年65人、2023 年56人、2024年64人、2025年67人；2026年计划69人，较2025年小幅扩招2人，扩幅约3%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续 上升：2021年第30→2022年第29→2023年第30→2024年第27→2025年第25→2026年第24，已进入全国Top25，学校层次稳步提升，对高分考生吸引力增强；2024年声誉 评价为「明显负面」，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名；2025–2026年声誉数据中未再出现负面事件，舆情已基本消化。抖音热度总排名第13（高热 ），食堂特色内容传播广泛，整体关注度较高。未见明显投档断档记录；作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A， 共7个A-及以上学科（5个A+），农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；食品科学与工程、动物医学类等本校优势专业热度平稳。云南省2026年考生总数约377900人，按近年比例估算物理类约229200人，较2025年173282人大幅增长约32%，竞争显著 加剧。；中国农业大学位于北京，对云南考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在云南招生规模较大（物理类约67–69人），属在京985高 校中在滇招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约9598名、2026年计划小幅扩招3%、本省物理类考生大幅增长约32%、学校软科排名持续上升至第24位、抖 音高热关注度等因素，竞争加剧是主导力量，预计最低录取位次较2025年小幅上移。预测最低位次约10000名，区间9500–10500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science students was approximately 5302 → 5561 → 5077 → 4513, showing a fluctuating upward trend; after switching to the new Gaokao physics category in 2025, due to applied majors at Yantai Research Institute (urban and rural planning, facility agriculture, etc.) lowering the overall threshold, the minimum ranking dropped sharply to about 9598, while the main campus major group still maintained a minimum of 4510. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9598; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 64 in 2021, 65 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 64 in 2024, 67 in 2025; 69 in 2026, a slight expansion of 2 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 3%, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continues to rise: 2021 30th → 2022 29th → 2023 30th → 2024 27th → 2025 25th → 2026 24th, entering the national Top 25, steadily improving school level, enhancing attractiveness to high-scoring students; 2024 reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative', mainly due to poor admissions communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a drop of about 500 places in the admission threshold; 2025–2026 reputation data no longer shows negative events, public opinion has largely been digested. Douyin heat total ranking 13th (high heat), cafeteria specialty content widely spread, overall attention is high. No obvious admission gaps recorded; Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, a total of 7 A- and above disciplines (5 A+), agricultural and forestry disciplines are top nationally, strongly attracting related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; Food Science and Engineering, Animal Medicine and other advantageous majors of the school have stable popularity. The total number of candidates in Yunnan Province in 2026 is about 377,900, estimated at about 229,200 for the physics category based on recent proportions, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 173,282 in 2025, intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Yunnan candidates; the school has a relatively large enrollment scale in Yunnan (about 67–69 in physics category), making it one of the 985 universities in Beijing with higher enrollment in Yunnan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 9598, a slight 3% expansion in 2026 enrollment, a significant 32% increase in provincial physics category candidates, the school's Soft Science ranking rising to 24th, and high Douyin heat attention, intensified competition is the dominant factor, and the minimum admission ranking is expected to rise slightly compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking about 10000, range 9500–10500.

Rankings better than 9500 can focus on popular high-score majors like Computer Science and Veterinary Medicine; rankings near 10500 are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Agronomy, which are the school's flagship and relatively less competitive, and ensure Tier 3 safety majors. Yantai Research Institute applied majors have lower ranking thresholds, suitable for candidates near the lower limit of the range as a stable choice.

The minimum admission ranking is expected to move up slightly compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 3200, range 2720–3680.
